storage.title: Storage
storage.warning: Storage almost full! Export your data as a backup and delete old sessions.

backup.title: Data Backup
backup.exportDescription: Export all your data as a JSON file. Use it to create a backup or transfer your data to another device.
backup.importDescription: Import a previously exported backup. Caution: your current data will be replaced!
backup.importSuccess: Import successful! The app will use the new data after the next page change.
backup.confirmMessage: Caution: importing replaces your current data. Do you want to continue?

about.description: Your digital coaching app for table football.
